response.justification: Bogdan has a strong general software engineering pedigree with genuine TypeScript and cloud exposure, and his current role at re:cinq includes MCP framework work that is directionally relevant. However, the role demands 8+ years of production-grade AI solution delivery, and his AI experience appears to have started only in April 2025. Python — listed as a primary required language — is entirely absent from his skills. There is no mention of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks anywhere in the resume, and the customer-facing technical leadership dimension of the role is not evidenced.
strengths: Current work on MCP code generators and agentic workflow infrastructure at re:cinq directly maps to a key technology in the JD
Demonstrated staff-level ownership across multiple organisations with high-throughput, latency-sensitive systems (Dunnhumby, Optilyz)
Hands-on AWS CDK and cloud infrastructure experience with TypeScript in a production setting
concerns: Python is absent from all listed skills despite being a required primary language alongside TypeScript
AI/ML delivery experience is confined to the current role (April 2025–present), falling far short of the required 8+ years building production AI solutions
No evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation/observability pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks such as LangGraph or CrewAI
